text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: My mother is a chronologist… Back at home, she had a magnificent study. It was filled with all sorts of "History Books"—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Back when I was little, the thing that captivated me the most… was the "History of Racing" of horsegirls.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Racing history is full of profound drama… and it's not something that ends with just one individual — it's the drama found atop a woven history.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …I couldn't help but be excited. The more I learned about the past, the larger that grand "picture scroll" became.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: History is a "painting" Countless "dots" drawn by all those involved in racing connect to form lines, revealing — a single, massive canvas.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf marked a brilliant dot. But beyond her — lay Tokai Teio. Because of all the girls who followed in her footsteps, the painting was completed.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Special Week, Grass Wonder, El Condor Pasa… had any one of those girls been absent from their era, the painting wouldn't be the masterpiece it is today.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …By the time I realized those truths, I was already… captivated. By history. And—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I felt that I wanted to be inside that painting.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Gran and Love are about to make their marks. I want to do the same, but……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I'm still lacking. Completely. Not just against the legends of the past… but also against my friends, who are about to carve out the future.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …I hate that. I mustn't forgive my own inadequacy. Because—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to be a part of weaving that history, too.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —I want to give someone else that same sense of wonder I felt as a child. That's what I'm striving for…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …………Ah. I-I'm so sorry…! I've been talking for so long, all by myself…
choice_data_list: Not at all. …Thanks for sharing with me
Not at all. …Thanks for sharing with me

text_block_list.text: I finally see the reason behind her intense focus. —She has a dream. And to achieve it, she's willing to put in every ounce of work she can.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Of course, I know that it's a grand ambition to have…
choice_data_list: That's not true. —Not in the slightest

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Trainer.
Because in that mock race, I really felt that she was holding back. I'm convinced that with just a small shift, she could become a legend — I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Actually. In two weeks, there's a Tracen Academy Open Day. It's an event where we invite racing fans to visit……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I'll be running in an event race that's being held there. That's why I don't want to put on a poor performance…
choice_data_list: I see, so that's why…

text_block_list.text:
…Hearing about her dream and knowing her passion. 
Before I knew it, the words just naturally slipped out of my mouth.
choice_data_list: If it's okay, would you let me help you?
If it's okay, would you let me help you?

text_block_list.text: A few days later, I asked Chrono Genesis to let me watch several videos of her past races. …In every single one, she was running with a pensive look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Here, in the "Hanshin Juvenile Fillies"… I chose my position based on the way Buena Vista ran when she won.
choice_data_list: What about the opening on the inside?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …To be honest, I was torn. The year after Buena-san's, the winning horsegirl came from the inside. I wasn't sure which one to use as a reference…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: But I stayed on the outside. Looking at past mock races, #8 on the inside had a tendency to veer off course. To ensure the win—
choice_data_list: …Do you always think this much while running?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Yes. History is an "proven fact," after all… I feel like it would be a waste not to make use of it…
choice_data_list: I get it now……

text_block_list.text: As I watched her races alongside her commentary, I noticed something. That was—
choice_data_list: You're overthinking during your races

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: O-Overthinking… you say…?
Her profound knowledge of racing history is certainly a weapon. However—I get the impression she's becoming too top-heavy by trying to reference it all the time.
choice_data_list: Just run free! Don't overthink it

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-I see…… so, run freely. 
Right, I'll make sure to keep that in mind…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Running my own way, without looking back at the past… 
Freely… without thinking about anything—)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaーーーーーaaaah!!!!
choice_data_list: T-This is——!!

text_block_list.text: I call out "Good work" to a breathless Chrono Genesis. Afterward, I share my thoughts with her about that run she just did.
choice_data_list: A runaway like that might be a bit too much…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so sorry…! I was so focused on just running freely that before I knew it, I ended up like this… ugh…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Until now, I've only ever run by using history as my guide… So, when I'm told not to reference anything, well…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I wonder what my true way of running really is…
choice_data_list: Don't even worry about that

text_block_list.text: The way she runs when she isn't thinking about anything at all — that should be her "true style." That's why "thinking about nothing" is so important, but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-I see…even without being conscious of what "my" way of running is… 
………….
choice_data_list: (She's still got that pensive look on her face…)
(She's still got that pensive look on her face…)

text_block_list.text: As it turns out, just telling her "Don't think, just run!" wasn't a sufficient enough tip to solve her problem. I need to come up with some more constructive advice—
…I want to give her that advice, but right now, I can't think of anything. — If so, what do I do? If I were to look for the answer a history-lover like her is searching for…
choice_data_list: …How about we go to the Museum?
…How about we go to the Museum?

text_block_list.text: Chrono Genesis has lived her life alongside history. Expecting someone like her to simply cut herself off from history during a race is too much to ask. If that's the case, then—
choice_data_list: Let's rethink what history is to you
Let's rethink what history is to you

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I see…… 
What history means to me is—oh.
choice_data_list: Hmm? Did you find something?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: No, well… there was a special exhibit, so I just… There wasn't anything like this here the other day……
choice_data_list: You're right. Want to take a look?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… y-yes…! 
If that's alright with you, Trainer…
We watch a video exhibit titled "The Legacy of Back-to-Back Grand Prix Wins" It featured the legendary horsegirls who achieved immortal status through their historic runs——
